Issues: The subject matter (dew-covered spiderwebs in a field) is an extremely common nature motif, leading to high competition in stock photography markets.
The heavy reliance on backlighting and atmospheric haze makes the image beautiful but also fragile; if the lighting conditions were slightly off, the shot would lose much of its dramatic appeal.
While technically sound, the composition is centered and predictable, which limits its unique selling proposition (USP).
